heading: Step 7: Click .
body:
Atlas generates an entity-relationship diagram with the selected
collections and displays it in the current tab. Atlas also
displays the [side panel](atlas-ui-dm-side-panel) where you can
rename your diagram and view the following information:

- The database you used to generate your diagram

- When you first generated the diagram

- When you last updated your diagram

After you generate a diagram, Atlas displays the existing
diagrams in the **Data Modeling** tab.

> **Note:** If you click a collection or field in your diagram, the side panel
> displays information about the collection or field. To go back to the
> **Data Model Overview**, deselect the collection or field by
> clicking the empty space in your diagram.
